since_last: 70% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.25% · BTC +1.55% · Gold -0.01% · Nasdaq100 +0.77%. 70% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.30%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.30%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +5.67%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.67%, TER +5.12%, MRVL +5.11%, MDB +4.85%, PUBM +4.48%. Laggards: AAPL -2.47%, ORCL -2.23%, TLN -2.01%, DELL -1.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.60% at $123.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
